svg.text: PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB · ⊕ = Hypertable · ▶ = Primary Key · → = Foreign Key · * = append-only (INSERT only)
→ user_id UUID FK users.id NOT NULL
INSTRUMENTS (master reference — FK target for most tables)
daily refresh 07:30 IST from Kite CSV
→ order_id UUID FK orders.id NOT NULL
No UPDATE or DELETE — immutable audit
FK relationship line (solid = close, dashed = long-distance routing)

All tables use UUID PKs except: instruments (INTEGER instrument_token from Kite), expiry_calendar (SERIAL), instrument_refresh_log (SERIAL) · All timestamps are TIMESTAMPTZ (UTC) · Decimal monetary values never stored as FLOAT
